utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Look at you , all sweet and innocent , sleeping like an angel ... with Emma chubby little hands wrapped around you .

emotion_cause.span: 1_with Emma chubby little hands wrapped around you .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: It is okay , Emma , you stay asleep .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Step away from the crib , I have a weapon !

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: It is okay , it is okay Rach , it is me . Put down the scrunchy .

emotion_cause.span: 3_Step away from the crib , I have a weapon !

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Well , I heard Emma stirring , so I came to make sure she could reach Hugsy .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Oh , oh thanks . Alright well , now that I am up I am going to go to the bathroom .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: There you go sweetie ... This is not over .
